content.en:
Perfect Ancestral Endowment: Atomization

Perfect Ancestral Gift: Phantom

Perfect Ancestral Fu: Beam Kill

These are the three perfection-level ancestral endowments that the Misty Serpent has, among which the bundle kill belongs to the bondage class and the perfect-level ancestral endowment that kills, and the atomized perfect-level ancestral endowment can be turned into a special mist to negate the attack.

Phantom Perfection-level Ancestral Endowment belongs to the Illusion Perfect-level Ancestral Endowment.

When these three perfection-level ancestral endowments were combined, it was enough to make the Mist Serpent extremely terrifying.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian fused these three perfection-level ancestral endowments one by one, and soon turned these three perfection-level ancestral endowments into his own perfect-level ancestral endowments.

These three Perfection Levels are indeed very good, but the real value is to assist in the realization of Perfect Control Techniques, as well as to create top-notch Perfect Control Skills in the future.

If you don't have a perfect-level ancestral endowment, if you rely on yourself, it will be too difficult to create a perfect-level ancestral endowment, but if you have a perfect-level ancestral endowment, it will be many times less difficult.

"I just came to the Blood War Capital and had such a harvest, and it was the right one!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian took a look at the blood battle list.

The Blood War List is a special list of the Blood War Capital, which represents the degree of progress.

Just entered the blood battle list, and the speed of progress is zero.

At this time, it must be at the last place on the blood battle list, and the higher the list, the more resources and rewards will be obtained, which will intensify every half-step perfect controller to frantically attack the higher rankings of the blood battle list.

And the progress of every half-step perfect controller can't hide the blood battle list, because the blood battle list itself is not an ordinary list, but a perfect treasure, and it is a high-level perfect treasure.

In the Blood War Capital, the progress of any half-step perfect controller cannot shield the Blood Battle Leaderboard.

Therefore, don't want to show a small part of your strength first, and then show all your strength, and pretend that you are making rapid progress, it doesn't make any sense.

"Three hundred and eighty-six on the Blood Battle List!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Obviously, there are very few half-step perfect controllers who are qualified to enter the Blood War Capital, and even the Daoless Tower is estimated to not have many places in the Blood War Capital.

And the fact that the Wudao Tower gave him the quota directly is enough to show that the top management of the Wudao Tower attaches great importance to him.

Soon.

The first batch of resources in the Blood War Capital was distributed to Ye Tian.

These resources include artifacts that increase half-step Perfect Will, half-step Perfect Mastery, and passes to certain treasure lands.

After all, the Blood War Capital has mastered a lot of cultivation treasures, but it is not limited to Zhendao Mountain.

However, Ye Tian was not in a hurry to go to those cultivation treasure lands, he came one by one, after all, there were regulations on the cultivation time of each cultivation treasure land, and if he wanted to cultivate for a longer time, he had to have a high enough ranking.

"After refining these resources first, the will clone will go to the Misty Serpent to practice first. "

Ye Tian decided.

The mist in the body of the Misty Serpent can assist in refining the half-step perfect will, so it is an excellent cultivation environment.

If you practice at the beginning, the effect will be very good, that is, after practicing for a long time, the effect will decline until there is no effect.

And the half-step perfect controller who has just come here is recommended to go to the body of the misty snake to cultivate, this is the first place to go to the cultivation treasure land.

Wow!

Ye Tian's will clone shuttled quickly, leaving from the Blood War Capital and heading to the Misty Snake.

From the Blood War Capital, if you go to the body of the Mist Snake, you will not be stopped by the Mist Snake, and the other party does not care about the small insect at the level of a half-step perfect controller, because it has no effect on itself.

Of course, if a perfect master wants to stay in its body, it will definitely not do it.

And the most suitable place for cultivation in the body of the Misty Snake is its seven inches, where the fog is the thickest, and it is also the best natural treasure land.

Almost all the cultivators of the Blood War Capital will come here to receive the will tempering of the mist, after all, the refining effect here is better than that of other regions, and the half-step perfect controllers naturally want to come here to cultivate.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to the seven inches of the Misty Snake, the time and space here were very distorted, and he had to withstand the suppression from the Misty Snake itself.

Many half-step perfect controllers don't know that this is due to the coercion of the Misty Serpent because of the problem of the area here.

Now.

Ye Tian stood here, sensed it all around, and sensed the will clones of more than a dozen half-step perfect controllers, all of whom were cultivating here.

Subsequently, Ye Tian also began to practice.

"Variety Void Technique!"

Ye Tian performed this secret technique and cooperated with his cultivation.

Rumble!!!

With the refining of the mist, coupled with the assistance of the Hundred Transformation Void Technique, Ye Tian's half-step perfect will progressed quite quickly.

Time passes.

Ye Tian's half-step perfect will is rapidly improving, and the half-step perfect control will is also rapidly improving.

Ye Tian even took out the liquid gold liquid to refine in order to quickly improve his strength.

There are so many flowing gold liquid in his hand, even a perfect controller can't take it out, once it is all refined, the half-step perfect control body can imagine how far it will be improved.

Therefore, he can definitely quickly improve his ranking in the blood battle list.

In the blink of an eye, a hundred eternal years have passed.

Not only that, Ye Tian's body was not idle, and he comprehended the perfect control technique on the side of the origin realm sea, and also created several perfect control techniques.

For example, the perfect control technique of the body style that can be used in battle - fog body!

Not only does the body of fog have terrifying speed, but it also has the effect of negating attacks.

Another example is the perfect control technique of the space-time shadow thorn, this perfect control technique condenses time and space to the extreme, and cooperates with the power of the perfect level ancestor to form countless space-time thorns, and when the enemy is instantly bound, it will also penetrate the enemy, even if it is hidden in the depths of endless time and space, it is difficult to avoid this move.

There are also other perfect mastery techniques, all of which are very powerful.

After having so many perfect control skills, Ye Tian's strength has also improved a lot.

However, his strength still did not cause a qualitative change, although he was infinitely close to the top half-step perfect master, it should still be a little behind.

However, his progress in the blood battle list has attracted the attention of many half-step perfect controllers.

When he first came to the Blood War Capital, Ye Tian was ranked 386th on the Blood War List.

And at this moment, he was already ranked 336th on the blood battle list, and he had suddenly improved by fifty places.

You must know that the half-step perfect controllers who can enter the Blood War City are very demonic, and Ye Tian has surpassed so many half-step perfect controllers in just a hundred Realm River Years after entering the Blood War Capital, which really surprised them.

All of a sudden, many half-step perfect controllers were inquiring about Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian also attracted the attention of the high-level leaders of the Blood War Capital.

These high-level leaders are all perfect controllers from the top forces, and naturally there are also perfect controllers of the Wudao Tower.
